summary: Completed frontend testing of Rooms page hero section refinement. Successfully verified the new contextual panel implementation with proper positioning, styling, and responsive behavior.
passed_tests: Hero section loads correctly with 2-column grid layout on desktop
Contextual panel positioned correctly on right side, same row as main text
Panel content matches requirements: 'Odak alanın' title and 'Online odalarda kesintisiz çalış' text
Panel styling correct: ~280px width, rounded-2xl, soft gradient background, proper shadow
Grid layout uses expected 2-column structure (1446px + 280px columns)
All quick action buttons present and functional
Create room button functionality works correctly
Form section displays properly after button interaction
Mobile responsiveness works correctly with single-column stacked layout
Panel maintains styling and content on mobile devices
No layout or functional regressions detected
